ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "team_contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the team */,
  "team_contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the team */,
  "team_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team manager */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* ID of the league the team belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_team_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_manager_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scheduling_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each scheduling request */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team submitting the request */,
  "request_text" TEXT /* Text of the scheduling request */,
  "request_date" TEXT /* Date the request was submitted */,
  "request_status" TEXT /* Status of the request (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  "request_priority" TEXT /* Priority of the request (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "request_deadline" TEXT /* Deadline for the request */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scheduling_requests_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "request_accommodations" (
  "accommodation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each accommodation record */,
  "request_id" INTEGER /* ID of the scheduling request being accommodated */,
  "accommodated" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the request was accommodated */,
  "accommodation_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of the request that was accommodated */,
  "accommodation_rate" TEXT /* Rate of accommodation (e.g., 92%, None) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments related to the accommodation */,
  "accommodation_date" TEXT /* Date the accommodation was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("accommodation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_request_accommodations_request_id FOREIGN KEY ("request_id") REFERENCES scheduling_requests ("request_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team playing the game */,
  "opponent_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the opponent team */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "game_time" TEXT /* Time of the game */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the game */,
  "game_status" TEXT /* Status of the game (e.g., scheduled, played, canceled) */,
  "game_type" TEXT /* Type of game (e.g., regular season, playoff, friendly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_opponent_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("opponent_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team preference */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team with the preference */,
  "preference_text" TEXT /* Text of the team's preference */,
  "preference_date" TEXT /* Date the preference was set */,
  "preference_type" TEXT /* Type of preference (e.g., date, time, location) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_preferences_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_contacts" (
  "contact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team contact */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the contact belongs to */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the contact person */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact person */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact person */,
  "contact_position" TEXT /* Position of the contact person (e.g., manager, coach, coordinator) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_contacts_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scheduling_reasons" (
  "reason_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each scheduling reason */,
  "reason_description" TEXT /* Description of the scheduling reason */,
  "reason_type" TEXT /* Type of reason (e.g., team availability, field availability, weather) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reason_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scheduling_request_reasons" (
  "request_reason_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each request-reason link */,
  "request_id" INTEGER /* ID of the scheduling request */,
  "reason_id" INTEGER /* ID of the scheduling reason */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_reason_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scheduling_request_reasons_request_id FOREIGN KEY ("request_id") REFERENCES scheduling_requests ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scheduling_request_reasons_reason_id FOREIGN KEY ("reason_id") REFERENCES scheduling_reasons ("reason_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., team manager, league administrator, scheduler) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "accessed_table" TEXT /* Table that was accessed */,
  "accessed_data" TEXT /* Data that was accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leagues" (
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the league */,
  "league_description" TEXT /* Description of the league */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_stats" (
  "game_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game statistic */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "goals_scored" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the team */,
  "goals_conceded" INTEGER /* Number of goals conceded by the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_stats_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_stats_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)
